response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus recent hands-on exposure to MCP servers and agentic tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience amounts to roughly six months of AI-adjacent infrastructure work. There is no evidence of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation, or cloud-based AI system design, which are core to this staff-level GenAI delivery role.
strengths: 15+ years of broad production engineering experience, including staff-level roles and high-scale, low-latency systems
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Proven mentoring and customer-facing skills via workshops, courses, conference talks, and consulting work
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~6 months of AI-adjacent work)
No demonstrated experience with Python, vector databases, RAG, or LLM evaluation and optimization
Currently in a ~9-month career gap with no stated AI upskilling or projects during that period

key_factors.factor: Deep general engineering breadth with TypeScript and cloud
